params.TriggerDescription: Whenever chaos ensues, create two 1/1 white Warrior creature tokens.

params.Description: Each creature card in your graveyard has scavenge. The scavenge cost is equal to its mana cost. (Exile a creature card from your graveyard and pay its mana cost: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to that card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.)
